'Still Into You' by Paramore, released March 14, 2013, as the second single from their self-titled album, is a pop-rock love song written by Hayley Williams and Taylor York. Inspired by Williams’ relationship with Chad Gilbert, it celebrates enduring love with lyrics like “I’m still into you” despite challenges. The track, produced by Justin Meldal-Johnsen, features a lighter, synth-driven sound, debuting live at SXSW 2013. It peaked at #24 on the Billboard Hot 100, hit #8 on Mainstream Top 40, and is certified 2x platinum in the US, with over 500 million Spotify streams by 2022, marking it as one of Paramore’s biggest hits.
